SIRA Security Policy v3.2
✅
Allowed link typesAll business-related links — meetings, docs, file shares, collaboration tools
🚫
URL shortenersBlocked by default — expanded and full destination verified before marking safe
🔍
External domainsRisk-scored against 50+ threat feeds; auto-quarantine for unknown or suspicious domains
🔒
Zero-trust principleAll links treated as untrusted until verified. No exceptions, no bypass without CISO approval
📊
Audit & loggingAll scans logged with timestamp, user, result, and risk score for compliance reporting
